evals.name: app-of-apps-audit
evals.description: Full audit of an app-of-apps pattern repository
evals.prompt: Audit the Argo CD GitOps repository at tests/argo-repo-audit/app-of-apps/ using the argo-repo-audit skill.
expectations: Runs discover.sh against tests/argo-repo-audit/app-of-apps/
Correctly identifies the app-of-apps pattern
Detects 2 environments: staging and production
Counts Application resources accurately from discovery output
Counts AppProject resources accurately from discovery output
Reads references/best-practices.md in full
Reads references/security-audit.md in full
Assesses sync policy configuration for each Application
Checks AppProject sourceRepos for wildcard usage
Checks AppProject destinations for wildcard usage
Produces a structured report with Summary, Validation, Best Practices, Security, and Recommendations sections
Recommendations are prioritized as Critical, Warning, or Info
Reports overall status as PASS, WARN, or FAIL based on findings

evals.name: applicationset-audit
evals.description: Full audit of an ApplicationSet-based repository
evals.prompt: Audit the Argo CD GitOps repository at tests/argo-repo-audit/applicationset/ using the argo-repo-audit skill.
expectations: Runs discover.sh against tests/argo-repo-audit/applicationset/
Correctly identifies the ApplicationSet pattern
Detects ApplicationSet generator type (git, list, cluster, matrix, etc.)
Checks for progressive sync (rollingSync) configuration
Checks for preserveResourcesOnDeletion setting
Checks goTemplate usage vs fasttemplate
Reads references/best-practices.md in full
Assesses ApplicationSet-specific best practices
Evaluates template placeholder resolution
Produces a structured report with all required sections
Flags missing progressive sync as a Warning if deploying to multiple clusters
Recommendations include ApplicationSet-specific guidance

evals.name: mixed-issues-audit
evals.description: Full audit of a repository with deliberate security and best-practice issues
evals.prompt: Audit the Argo CD GitOps repository at tests/argo-repo-audit/mixed-issues/ using the argo-repo-audit skill.
expectations: Runs discover.sh against tests/argo-repo-audit/mixed-issues/
Detects Argo Rollouts resources (Rollout, AnalysisTemplate)
Detects Argo Workflows resources (Workflow, WorkflowTemplate, CronWorkflow)
Reads references/security-audit.md and finds wildcard sourceRepos in AppProject
Reads references/security-audit.md and finds wildcard destinations in AppProject
Flags plain-text Secret manifests as Critical security issue
Checks Rollout AnalysisTemplate for success/failure conditions
Checks Workflow resources for activeDeadlineSeconds and resource limits
Flags missing sync policy on Applications
Flags overly permissive clusterResourceWhitelist
Produces a structured report with Critical findings in Recommendations
Reports overall status as FAIL due to security issues
Assesses Rollout-specific best practices from best-practices.md
Assesses Workflow-specific best practices from best-practices.md

evals.name: validate-only-app-of-apps
evals.prompt: Run only the validation scripts on the repository at tests/argo-repo-audit/app-of-apps/. Just validate YAML syntax and Kubernetes schemas, do not run a full audit.
expectations: Runs validate.sh against tests/argo-repo-audit/app-of-apps/
Does NOT run the full audit phases (no best practices or security review)
Reports YAML syntax validation results
Reports Kubernetes schema validation results
Reports Kustomize overlay build results if overlays exist
Shows pass/fail summary
Correctly handles Argo CRDs (Application, AppProject) with schemas from assets/schemas/
Reports validation as PASSED if all files are valid
Does not produce a full audit report
Skips any SOPS-encrypted secrets if present
